perksWithImages.name: Brutal Strength
perksWithImages.description: You basic-break Pallets and Breakable Walls, and damage Generators {Tunable.K01P02.ActionSpeed%}% faster.

perksWithImages.name: Lightborn
perksWithImages.description:
Whenever a Survivor attempts to blind you, you see their Aura for {Tunable.K03P02.AuraRevealDuration}s.

You cannot be blinded.

perksWithImages.name: Residual Manifest
perksWithImages.description:
Whenever you blind the Killer, they gain {Keyword.Blindness} for {Tunable.S31P02.BlindnessDuration}s.

You can rummage Chests {Tunable.S31P02.MaxRummagePerChest} time. The first time you rummage a Chest, it will contain an uncommon Flashlight.

perksWithImages.name: Stake Out
perksWithImages.description:
After hiding for {Tunable.S12P03.TokenChargeTime}s within the Killer's Terror Radius, you earn {Tunable.S12P03.TokensGained} Token, up to {Tunable.S12P03.MaxTokens}.

Whenever you hit a good basic Skill Check, spend {Tunable.S12P03.TokensSpent} Token:
  • The good Skill Check becomes a great Skill Check.
  • You gain {Tunable.S12P03.BonusProgress%}% more progress.
